nodes.label: Unfold
nodes.description: A conversation card game built as a single HTML file. Tagline: 'One card at a time, everyone unfolds a little.' Deployed on Vercel and as an Android APK via Expo EAS.

nodes.label: index.html
nodes.description: Primary deployment HTML file for the Unfold web app. Single-file implementation with vanilla JS/CSS. Identical in content to conversation-deck.html.

nodes.label: conversation-deck.html
nodes.description: Alternate or development copy of the main Unfold HTML file. Contains identical structure and logic to index.html.

nodes.label: CATS Data Structure
nodes.description: JavaScript object holding all 7 card decks. Each key maps to an object with: name (display label), color (CSS variable), foot (gameplay hint), and cards (array of prompt strings).

nodes.label: Icebreakers Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 light, easy-opener conversation prompts. Color: gold (--gold). Foot text: 'Easy openers. Answer on instinct.'

nodes.label: This or That Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 binary-choice prompts. Color: sky (--sky). Foot text: 'Pick a side. Then defend it.'

nodes.label: Hot Takes Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 mildly controversial opinion prompts. Color: rose (--rose). Foot text: 'Mildly controversial. Stay civil.'

nodes.label: Get to Know You Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 personal story prompts. Color: rust (--rust). Foot text: 'Stories and the real you.'

nodes.label: For Friends Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 deeper friendship-oriented prompts. Color: moss (--moss). Foot text: 'The real stuff, asked gently.'

nodes.label: Relationships Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 romantic/partnership prompts. Color: wine (--wine). Foot text: 'Building and keeping a we.'

nodes.label: Truth or Truth Deck
nodes.description: Card deck with 24 honest self-disclosure prompts. Color: amber (--amber). Foot text: 'No passing. No dodging. Just honesty.'

nodes.label: Card Flip Animation
nodes.description: CSS 3D flip animation using rotateY(180deg) on the .card element. Triggered by tapping/clicking the card. Uses transform-style: preserve-3d and backface-visibility: hidden on .face elements. Transition: 0.6s cubic-bezier.

nodes.label: Card Deal Animation
nodes.description: CSS @keyframes 'deal' animation applied when a new card is drawn. Animates from translateY(30px) rotate(-4deg) scale(0.93) opacity 0.2 to normal state. Duration: 0.45s.

nodes.label: Deck Toggle / Chip Filter
nodes.description: UI chips at the top allow enabling/disabling individual decks. Active decks are tracked in a Set. 'All decks' chip enables all simultaneously. Toggling rebuilds the card pool.

nodes.label: Card Pool
nodes.description: Runtime array 'pool' holding unseen cards for the current session. Built by iterating active decks and filtering out already-seen cards. Shuffled using Fisher-Yates algorithm.

nodes.label: Progress Tracking
nodes.description: Tracks which cards have been answered or skipped per deck, stored as 'deckKey:idx' keys in the 'seen' object. Persisted to localStorage under key 'unfold_v1'. Progress bar and count shown in UI.

nodes.label: localStorage Persistence
nodes.description: Card state (answered/skipped) is persisted in localStorage under key 'unfold_v1'. Falls back gracefully if localStorage is unavailable. Checked via try/catch on a test write.

nodes.label: Auto Reset on Deck Completion
nodes.description: When all cards in active decks have been seen, the deck auto-resets (clears seen state for active decks) and reshuffles, showing a toast: 'All cards seen — deck reshuffled!'

nodes.label: Manual Reset
nodes.description: A 'Reset all progress' button triggers confirmReset(). On user confirmation, clears all seen state, re-enables all decks, and rebuilds the pool.

nodes.label: Toast Notification
nodes.description: Fixed-position toast UI element that shows brief messages (e.g. 'Answered', 'Skipped', 'Shuffled'). Appears via CSS opacity/transform transition, auto-hides after a timeout.

nodes.label: Keyboard Shortcuts
nodes.description: Space bar: if card is revealed, marks as answered; otherwise draws next card. 'F' key: toggles card flip (same as tapping).

nodes.label: Soft Shuffle
nodes.description: Rebuilds the card pool from unseen cards only and resets card to back state, without clearing progress. Shows toast 'Shuffled — unseen cards only'.

nodes.label: Mark Card Answered/Skipped
nodes.description: After flipping a card, user can mark it as 'answered' (green checkmark button) or 'skipped' (skip arrow button). Marks the card in seen state and auto-draws the next card after 480ms.

nodes.label: CSS Design System / Color Palette
nodes.description: CSS custom properties defining the visual theme: --paper (#f4ead5), --ink (#1c1410), --rust (#c14a2b), --teal (#2c6b5e), --gold (#d99a2b), --plum (#6a3d6e), --sky (#3a6ea5), --rose (#b5446e), --moss (#4f7a42), --wine (#9c2c4d), --amber (#d4891a). Each deck gets its own color.

nodes.label: Typography
nodes.description: Uses two Google Fonts: Fraunces (serif, for body/card prompts) and Space Mono (monospace, for UI labels, chips, buttons). Loaded via Google Fonts CDN.

nodes.label: PWA / Mobile Web App Meta
nodes.description: Meta tags for mobile-web-app-capable, apple-mobile-web-app-capable, theme-color (#1c1410), and apple-mobile-web-app-title ('Unfold'). Inline base64 PNG used for apple-touch-icon and favicon.

nodes.label: Chip Progress Display
nodes.description: Each deck chip shows a small sub-label with 'X/Y left' unseen card count, or 'done' when all cards in that deck have been seen. Done chips are shown at 45% opacity.

nodes.label: Progress Bar
nodes.description: A narrow bar (90px wide, 5px tall) filled with --rust color showing overall progress percentage across all active decks. Accompanied by a text count '# unseen · # done'.

nodes.label: Watermark
nodes.description: Fixed-position watermark in the bottom-right corner: '© Jason Tjiadi'. Font: Space Mono, very low opacity.

nodes.label: apk/AGENTS.md
nodes.description: Agent instruction file for the APK subdirectory. Key instruction: 'Expo HAS CHANGED — Read the exact versioned docs at https://docs.expo.dev/versions/v56.0.0/ before writing any code.'

nodes.label: apk/CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Claude Code config for the APK subdirectory. Contains only '@AGENTS.md', deferring all instructions to AGENTS.md.

nodes.label: Expo EAS (Android APK Build)
nodes.description: The APK subdirectory contains an Expo/React Native project for building an Android APK via Expo EAS. Expo SDK v56.0.0 is the versioned target. Configured via eas.json and app.json.

nodes.label: android-icon-background.png
nodes.description: Visual asset: Android adaptive icon background layer PNG. Used as part of the adaptive icon set for the Unfold Android APK.

nodes.label: android-icon-foreground.png
nodes.description: Visual asset: Android adaptive icon foreground layer PNG. Used as part of the adaptive icon set for the Unfold Android APK.

nodes.label: android-icon-monochrome.png
nodes.description: Visual asset: Android monochrome icon PNG. Used for themed icon support on Android 13+.

nodes.label: favicon.png
nodes.description: Visual asset: Favicon PNG for the Unfold APK/Expo project. Also embedded inline as base64 in index.html and conversation-deck.html.

nodes.label: icon.png
nodes.description: Visual asset: Main app icon PNG for the Unfold Expo project. Used as the app launcher icon.

nodes.label: splash-icon.png
nodes.description: Visual asset: Splash screen icon PNG for the Unfold Expo project. Shown during app launch.

nodes.label: Vercel Deployment
nodes.description: The Unfold web app is deployed on Vercel as a static site serving index.html.

nodes.label: Vanilla JavaScript
nodes.description: The game logic is implemented in plain (vanilla) JavaScript with no external JS frameworks. All DOM manipulation, state management, and game logic are handwritten.

nodes.label: Single HTML File Architecture
nodes.description: The entire web app (HTML structure, CSS styles, JavaScript logic, and card data) is contained within a single .html file. No build step required for the web version.

nodes.label: Jason Tjiadi
nodes.description: Creator/copyright holder of Unfold. Watermark '© Jason Tjiadi' appears in the app.
